pr.title: ftcoll match, itparasol match, removal of math.h where it was problematic for itparasol and ftcommon matching
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Matched ftcommon.c and itparasol.c by moving both objects from asm/nonmatching to C/matching in configure.py and obj_files.mk, while making small source-level changes to avoid math.h-related matching problems. The PR also improved ftcoll prototypes enough to replace one NOT_IMPLEMENTED wrapper with a concrete call to ftColl_8007861C.
what_changed: Changed configure.py entries for melee/ft/ftcommon.c and melee/it/items/itparasol.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Changed obj_files.mk so ftcommon and itparasol build from src C objects instead of asm object files.
Removed #include "math.h" from src/melee/ft/ftcommon.c and added local definitions for M_PI, ABS, and fabs_inline with a todo noting these should eventually live in a single file rather than math.h.
Removed #include "math.h" from src/melee/it/items/itparasol.c and added local M_PI plus static deg_to_rad = M_PI / 180.
Updated ftColl_8007861C from unknown parameters to an explicit signature taking bool, Fighter_GObj*, several ints, u32, and UNK_T.
Updated ftColl_800788D4 to call ftColl_8007861C(0, gobj, 0, -10, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0) instead of remaining NOT_IMPLEMENTED.

Adjusted it_8028B1A4 local variable layout and arithmetic order: declares ry and fm up front, computes fm from attrs[2] plus fabsf(item velocity scaled by attrs[3]), multiplies by facing_dir, then adds deg_to_rad * fm to the current Y rotation.
Removed local static assertion-string arrays in itparasol.c: it_804D5260, it_804D5268, and it_803F5B80.
smart_moves: Avoided math.h when it interfered with matching, replacing only the needed constants/helpers locally instead of pulling in the problematic header.
Kept a clear todo on the temporary math workaround, preserving the intent that shared math constants/helpers should eventually be centralized.
Promoted only files evidenced as matching in both configure.py and obj_files.mk, keeping build metadata consistent.
Improved ftcoll.h and ftcoll.c together so the discovered ftColl_8007861C call shape is available to callers and not just locally encoded.
Matched itparasol arithmetic by reshaping temporaries and operation order rather than changing behavior.
decomp_lessons: Standard library or project-wide headers can perturb codegen enough to break matching; removing math.h and defining the exact minimal constants/helpers locally can be a practical short-term matching tactic.
When marking an object Matching, update both the configure object classification and obj_files.mk object path from asm to src.
Small expression-order changes, especially around float math and multiplication/addition sequencing, can matter for matching.
Replacing UNK_PARAMS with an explicit function signature can unlock caller matches and allow stubs/wrappers to become real calls.
Temporary local definitions should be annotated when they are matching workarounds rather than the desired long-term header structure.
naming_conventions: Kept existing address-based symbol names such as ftColl_8007861C, ftColl_800788D4, ftCommon_8007C930, and it_8028B1A4.
Used melee type names already established in the codebase: Fighter_GObj, Item_GObj, Item, HSD_JObj, Vec3, UNK_T.
Used a descriptive local helper name fabs_inline in ftcommon.c while preserving standard-like M_PI naming.
Used deg_to_rad as a file-local conversion constant in itparasol.c.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed math.h from ftcommon.c and itparasol.c to avoid matching regressions caused by that include.
Defined M_PI locally as 3.14159265358979323846 to preserve needed constant behavior without the header.
In itparasol.c, expressed rotation update through an intermediate fm variable and separate multiply by facing_dir before adding to ry.
In ftcoll, changed ftColl_800788D4 from a NOT_IMPLEMENTED body to a direct call with exact literal arguments, indicating wrapper/caller recovery.
Moved ftcommon.c and itparasol.c from asm object outputs to C object outputs after achieving matches.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that centralize M_PI, ABS, fabs_inline, or deg_to_rad after the todo introduced here.
Search for other files where removing math.h improved matching.
Check whether ftColl_8007861C later receives better parameter names or a fully implemented body.
Look for follow-up cleanups to itparasol.c assertion strings or JOBJ quaternion handling.
